text.title: Alert Dedup Playbook Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the alert-routing.yaml, audit-report, and paging SLO dashboard shape.

list.item: alerts..route: enum {page, ticket, silenced}
alerts..fingerprint: array of label names
alerts..grouping_window: duration (e.g. 5m, 1h, 6h)
alerts..runbook_url: required for `page` and `ticket` routes
silences: array of {alertname, matchers, expires_at, reason, set_by}
period (window analysed)
total_alerts + total_incidents_after_fingerprint
classification: per-alert family with counts and percent_actionable
routing_recommendation: per-family suggested route
fingerprint_recommendation: per-family suggested label set
paging_slo: current pages_per_week vs target
Pages per week per rotation with SLO line.
Top 10 alert families by page count.
Silenced alert count + count of silences expiring this week.
Time-to-acknowledge p50/p95 (proxy for on-call attention).

antipattern.reason: r4 violation. Permanent silences are forbidden.

antipattern.description: Alert family with route=page and no runbook_url.
antipattern.reason: Page-routed alert without runbook forces on-call to freelance during the incident.

antipattern.description: Alerts grouped via AlertManager defaults without explicit fingerprint declaration.
antipattern.reason: r2 violation. Implicit grouping is unpredictable.

antipattern.description: Audit report missing classification for any alert family that fired in the period.
antipattern.reason: r1 violation. Audit must cover every family before rule changes.

list.item: Every alert family in the source-of-truth Prometheus / Datadog rules has an entry in alert-routing.yaml.
Every silence has expiry within 90 days.
Pages-per-week SLO target documented and tracked.
Audit report committed to repo; review meeting scheduled within 14 days of audit.
Quarterly cadence enforced via calendar / cron.
